read-only.description: Read-only analysis. File writes are disabled and bash is restricted to read-only commands.
read-only.instructions: Do not modify files. Use read-only tools and read-only bash commands only.

workspace-write.description: Normal coding mode inside the current workspace with safety gates enabled.
workspace-write.instructions: Keep changes scoped to the current repository. Use container_bash for risky or dependency-heavy commands.

container.description: Prefer isolated container execution for shell commands.
container.instructions: Use container_bash for shell commands. Request network only when necessary.

review.description: Code review mode. No edits; inspect diffs and files only.
review.instructions: Do not modify files. Focus on actionable review findings with file paths and line numbers.
